references.passiveText: A patrol went missing near {location} last week. Nobody has gone looking for them yet.
references.triggerDialogue: {target_npc} led a group of four guards on a routine sweep {location_hint}. They were supposed to check in two days ago and haven't been heard from since. The commander doesn't have the resources to send a search party, but if someone stumbled across their trail, it could mean the difference between a rescue and a funeral.

references.passiveText: There are whispers that the recent disappearances are connected: not random attacks, but something organized.
references.triggerDialogue: Three settlements in the region have reported people going missing in the last month. {target_npc} at {location} has been tracking the pattern and believes the {enemy_type_plural} are building a labor camp somewhere {location_hint}. If that's true, this isn't just one rescue: it's the start of something much bigger.
